Add a description of Instancio and the purpose of the fixture builder library.
docs/index.md.human_impl:
## What is Instancio

> Instancio is a library for instantiating and populating objects with random data

docs/index.md.general_idea: Add Maven dependency snippet and installation instructions for the library.
docs/index.md.human_impl:
### Maven
Include the following dependency in your pom.xml
```xml
<dependency>
    <groupId>io.github.wouter-bauweraerts</groupId>
    <artifactId>instancio-fixture-builder</artifactId>
    <version>5.2.1</version>
</dependency>
```

docs/index.md.general_idea: Add a step-by-step guide on how to use the fixture builder pattern with Instancio.
docs/index.md.human_impl:
## How does it work?
1. Create a class for your fixture
2. Create a static inner class that extends __AbstractFixtureBuilder__.
